title: melica ciliata subsp. flavescens
intro: Melica ciliata subsp. flavescens, also known as golden melick, is a perennial plant species in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Melica ciliata subsp. flavescens is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are dried and used in infusions.
